notes: When attempting first run, it will install UPlay, it allows you to log into  UPlay and UPlay seems to work fine. The game however does not create a window, Steam will say it's playing (be careful of this if you intend to refund). I'm guessing it crashes, perhaps UPlay runs into an error somewhere?
